backends.label: MACE-MP medium

local_windows.reason: Verified on the RTX A4500 Windows local lab with torch 2.4.1+cu121 and mace-torch 0.3.16.

backends.notes: Universal MACE-MP ASE calculator; default model id uses the medium checkpoint.

backends.label: CHGNet

backends.label: M3GNet

local_windows.reason: Pinned dgl==2.4.0+cu121 wheel is Linux-only for this stack; route M3GNet to GCP or Hugging Face Linux runners.

backends.notes: MatGL/DGL backend; start with energy-volume if stress support is noisy.

backends.label: ORB v3 conservative

local_windows.reason: Uses a separate cu118 torch stack; run intentionally with disk headroom or prefer Linux cloud canaries.

backends.notes: Heavier PyTorch stack; use checkpointed single-row canaries before campaign fan-out.

backends.label: SevenNet 7net-0

backends.label: Meta FAIR Chemistry UMA small 1.1

local_windows.reason: fairchem-core 2.14.0 uses a separate torch 2.8-era stack; build/run in an isolated GCP image first.

backends.notes: Uses fairchem.core FAIRChemCalculator with pretrained_mlip.get_predict_unit(model=uma-s-1p1, task_name=omat). FairChem 2.14.0 exposes uma-s-1, uma-s-1p1, and uma-m-1p1. GCP image/import/GPU wiring is verified, and HF_TOKEN is mounted through Secret Manager, but facebook/UMA returned 403 until the account is added to the gated repo authorization list.
